Tests if `func` is a prototype of `Function` using `isPrototypeOf`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that checks if the `Function` prototype is part of the prototype chain of the [`func`](<#02-008func>) function. The [`func`](<#02-008func>) function is defined as an empty function. The `assert` statement verifies that `Function.prototype.isPrototypeOf(func)` returns `true`, confirming that [`func`](<#02-008func>) is indeed a function object. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a single assertion related to JavaScript's prototype chain behavior.
